INVALID_DATE_RANGE: The selected date range is invalid.
INVALID_MFA_CODE: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION: This action is not allowed in the current state.

MAX_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: Maximum test attempts have been exceeded.
MAX_SUBMISSIONS_EXCEEDED: Maximum assignment submissions have been exceeded.

TEST_NOT_AVAILABLE: This test is not available right now.
TEST_TIME_EXPIRED: The allowed time for this test has expired.
TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Try again later.
NETWORK_ERROR: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: A user with this username already exists.
USER_NOT_FOUND: The requested user was not found.
VALIDATION_FAILED: Please review the form fields and try again.
fallback: We couldn't complete the request. Please try again.
SPECIALTY_NOT_ACTIVE: Specialty is archived and cannot be used.
STREAM_NOT_ACTIVE: Stream is archived and cannot be used.
STREAM_SPECIALTY_YEAR_MISMATCH: Selected stream does not match group specialty or study year.
